reviews.review_description: Solid Metro entry especially as a new fan of the series and the game still does feel premium but i seen comments of people saying that Metro Awakening on quest 3 supposedly is running the quest 2 version if true thats dissapointing.. It would be nice to have the game pushing the limits of the quest 3 but anyways the game is still a blast and the immersion and quality is still undeniable! 🫡

Loved this game! My favorite game since Resident Evil 4.  The graphics are great, the action intense, and there's really good music that swells as the excitement builds. You have to have good strategy and tactics to get through each challenging level.  You can't just burst in Rambo style with guns blazing.  You need to often crouch down, turn off your headlamp, and sneak in while using one of the silent weapons like the bolt gun or the fun blowgun with poison darts.  A near-perfect game!

reviews.review_title: An experience I will not forget
reviews.review_description:
This is the best horror/thriller/mystery I have experienced in VR so far. I know there are talks of limitations for horror games in VR simply because it may trigger the body's natural fear response too heavily. I love horror, and I love a good story as well. 
It was captivating all the way to the end. As a glutton for punishment, knowing the nature of the game before I began, I took hallucinogens to make the experience more authentic to connect to the situation. I had to laugh here and there to defuse the terror, grim darkness and sorrow the story told. Looking forward to the next adventure. Thank you

reviews.review_title: One of the best VR games I’ve ever play
reviews.review_description: This game is a master piece, truly never have I ever seen a game with this much depth, character development, mechanics, and graphics as this one, this game is absolutely truly a master piece and deserves way more. Truly spectacular game would love to see another one like this come out.

If your into going to haunted house during Halloween,
 this game is for you.  It keeps you in suspense.  I'm very Happy I got this game to play it's definitely in my top 5 games and I have a lot games.  Props to the developer, keep it rock'n!!!

reviews.review_title: ⭐GREATEST AAA VR GAME MONEY CAN BUY⭐
reviews.review_description:
Wowzers, the graphics are phenomenal, really good job on that, like the atmosphere and immersion. 

The story is actually interesting for once and not shallow at all, with actual funny, real, well thought out characters and great voice acting with their thick russian accents sometimes making me laugh.

Plus the horror/action aspect is really fun but yet scary. Such as lurker holes burrowed around constantly keeping you on their toes, and the constant dark 

There are also fun details like wearing gas masks, checking ammo and powering your own flashlight. All those little bits make you feel like you're in a movie and yet also just super immersed.

PRO TIPS
Always make sure your vials are loaded so you don't die and DON'T STOP AT CHAPTER 1 KEEP GOING I SEE SO MANY SAYING ITS SLOW-PACED ITS NOT!!!

Anyways, I hope this review helped.

reviews.review_title: One of the best games on Quest
reviews.review_description: This game is one of the best VR games that the platform has to offer and sits alongside titles such as Batman Arkham Shadow, Resident Evil 4, and The Walking Dead Saints & Sinners. The graphics of the game are pretty good, though I recommend using QGO or a similar app to increase the resolution removing jagged edges in far away objects. The atmosphere of the game is fantastic with a lot of tension, the gunplay is good, there is a nice variety of weapons, good interactions and mechanics, interesting story, and a decent size campaign. The enemies are also great: human enemies communicate trying to flank you, the small mutants (lurkers) charge you running in a zigzag, and even spiders hide on the roof before jumping at you. The game also does a good job in switching between parts of tension, action, and stealth, so even though the campaign is long it doesn't feel repetitive. My only nitpick is that the game takes a bit too long to get going (the first 30 minutes is basically just walking around with story exposition), but this is a minor issue. It's a must buy game for anyone that has a VR headset in my opinion.

I loved it to the last little detail. This game is really but really good and well made. I am not usually the guy who likes when a game main focus is the protagonists thoughts and all that boring flashback stuff but somehow i was able to enjoy the game even though i was really scared of the spiders. And if you liked metro 2033 you are gonna love this.

Looked at the reviews prior to buying and had good review for the most part.   Started the game and thought it wasn't that great.    Finally got into the game and becomes much better.   Had a few moments I've jumped from some of the things going on.
Inventory is fun to use.   The movement itself for the character is a little clunky but not terrible.   Overall it has been fun playing so far.

reviews.review_title: Probably the best game on Meta Quest
reviews.review_description:
Metro Awakening is honestly one of the most immersive VR experiences I’ve played. From the moment you start, it doesn’t just feel like a game, it feels like you’re actually there, part of the mission, moving through the world yourself.
The atmosphere is intense. It’s dark, tense, and genuinely scary at times. There are moments where you’ll be stood in front of a door thinking, I really don’t want to go in there… but at the same time, you feel completely drawn in and compelled to keep going. That’s what makes it so addictive.
The balance between fear and curiosity is what really stands out. It keeps you on edge, but in a way that makes you want more rather than putting you off. You’re not just playing, you’re experiencing it.
If you’ve got a Meta Quest, this is definitely one to play. It’s gripping, immersive, and hard to put down.

Please please please Devs  🙏 make another game like this, it's amazing.

Also if you are reading this and haven't bought it yet, your mad... get it bought already!

Thank you for geting this game to VR.
When i play it first time i think this Is my best day ever.
This Is my favourite game (And i play a lot of games).
There Is only one thing, when you beat the Story you can't play.
I mean we nead open world, i beat the Story 4. Times And Now i dont got anything to play on this game Now.
I Now Its a biiiiig idea And Its hard to put in the game, but when you put it there, it makes the game moooore beter. Please Tell me if you plan to do update like this or not.
Thank you very much!👍♥️

The game has a quite slow burn progress so it may not please anyone and it gives low replayability.

It is an S-tier game with awesome graphics (close to PCVR quality), immersion, music and mechanics. The story may be inconsistent at some point but it's a part of its psychological dimensions as it's more of a "thriller" than a survival. The narration is very interesting and engaging.

The only complaint I could express would be the freedom of movement: no jumping, no roaming (it is linear) and not many interaction with objects.

reviews.review_title: Broken got stuck literally after 5 min
reviews.review_description:
So after 5 min of gameplay I got stuck after placing the bomb in the begining. After the explosion I get knocked down and then somebody is trying to get me up and then just black screen with red blob and gunfire. Pressing buttons doesn't do anything and restarting the mission did not fix it.

Edit: Restarted the headset and fixed my issue.

reviews.review_title: Best survival horror VR game ever ! 🤩
reviews.review_description: This game is a masterpiece of survival horror VR games, everything is amazing, triple AAA quality 10/10 🤩

Totally not worth the money. When the game first came out, it was advertised as a game that would sit next to a AAA game like Half-Life: Alyx. And with the price I paid, you would think that. But boy was I wrong, not only do the physics feel off, but the ambience and characters totally feel rushed and not like any AAA game at all. The quality of the game feels more like Half-Life 1, and I mean the textures not the gameplay, because I would rather play the ported version of HL1 VR on the Quest, because Metro Exodus feels like a hot mess. First of all, the developers surely tried copying HL:A, the multi-tool for example where Alyx can open doors by arranging the electrical current, is the same tool in this game but you need to rotate your tool like an alternator to feed the electricity, and there is also the Russian text everywhere on panels that does not need reading, also a direct copy from HL:A, and also the monsters are alien-like creatures. I would not mind all of that if the game had any form of wow factor to it, but I could not connect to the main character as well as all the other characters you meet. One great example is when you first encounter a monster and you shoot it, the character is speaking to someone via the radio, but it does not tell the guy on the radio that you just have encountered a creature, but instead you immediately start some nonsense story about your family on the radio, as if you weren't almost gnawed to death by a unknown creature. And also the storyline itself, it does not have any value to it. And the puzzles, just turning some valves, and constantly waiting to hear the monotone storyline before you can continue walking isn't just it. They also just darkened most of the areas so they could slap a cheap texture on the walls and call it a day. I tried the PC version to hopefully get the wow factor there, but it wasn't.. the clothes and hairs of people were just some poly mess, cheap borders so you can't bug yourself out of the game but kills the gameplay. I am sorry, but this is far from a AAA game.

If you like metro games, you'll like this. 
If you like horror games, you'll like this. 

It's a great game, sometimes a little slow in places. It definitely has Immersion and the arachnids are horrific to deal with, I ran past them.

reviews.review_title: The greatest campaign game ive played
reviews.review_description: This is one if not the most immersive and phenomenal game that i have ever played. The story telling is the greatest five ever scene in vr. The horror aspect was so good it genuinely scared the living crap out of me when monsters jumped on me and spiders the size of a paper towel roll jumped and crawled on my head and this was the only horror campaign game that made me feel scared in a good way. This is the first review i ever gave on a good game. I recommended this to anyone who is looking for a great story game.
I want my money back
Really enjoying the game so far. Amazing gameplay and controls!

No instability issues unlike other games with less detail or environmental story telling. They do an amazing job making you feel scared and uneasy as you navigate each tunnel and new terror. The supernatural slinks in slowly as you and your character question your sanity. Hallways that teleport back to start, shadow figures, voices and screams. The spiders are a nice touch as well though they can be difficult lol. This game is amazing and should be the staple for gaming quality moving ahead for all standalone VR titles. 
AMAZING JOB DEV TEAM!
Seriously they made an amazing experience.
I think I am happier with 20 dollars than 40 but now that I played I wish I'd of purchased it sooner!

Yes its peak and its terrifying I hate how scary it is but it's very polished great horror game because you can do everything yourself just like a VR game should be, this game is the best horror game on quest 10/10 wouldn't recommend
If you like the Metro series you would absolutely love this

Wow. Just finished.  That was the closest I’ve come to experiencing real fear… It’s so immersive, with frightening sound and suspense that truly made for a wild ride.  The spiders were a bit much… yikes.  Fighting wasn’t too difficult for me, I’m usually more of a puzzle adventure guy than a shooting guy, but I got the hang of it.  Graphics were great.  Function was great.  Audio was great.   Loved it, but also hated being scared… in a good way.

reviews.review_title: Not as great as it first appears
reviews.review_description: I've just completed this and wasn't very impressed overall. The story was quite bizarre and hard to follow at times. The game was great at building tension and anxiety but ultimately there was little action. The game consists of a LOT of walking around looking for ammo with very little in the way of enemies which is a  real shame because I loved sneaking around in the dark and picking them off when they appeared. I did like the unique weaponry and the way you reload them, they really had that DIY feel about them. I appreciate the game is designed to be dark and creepy, but it made it really difficult to navigate at times. I just completed the incredible Resident Evil 4 before this so it was quite a step down.

reviews.review_title: One of few I've left review
reviews.review_description:
I've bought a ton of games. This one was worthy of a rare 5 star rating and my time to leave a comment.  

If you can make it past the first 1 or 2 chapters,  you'll be in for a treat. Kinda starts off slow, but I guess its more of a tutorial type beginning without it being a tutorial.  
The immersion and graphics are great.. if i had any complaint, it would be that I couldn't clearly understand some of the strong accents. Took away from the story a bit. But im sure most have no problem with it.

This game had everything I look for. I hope there are more. And maybe you can gift me the sequel as my account is frozen on here with money on it and they keep giving me the run around because they can't fix it and refuse to refund my money or even put it on another account I had to open. But anyway great game. Didn't want it to end.

You need to have experienced the immersive Metro games or else it’s a 3 star game. The story just like the OG games is outstanding, and considering they’re immersive making it a VR game was a terrific choice. Note that I wrote “immersive.” You will walk and listen to conversations A LOT. You need to be immersed in the universe of Metro, and be open to experience a slow narrative of survival where the fight of a lone wolf comes, as it goes to a thrilling existential and paranormal story of a prequel. With that being said, I loved my time with this game, but please try to get it on a sale as it is a one time experience.

reviews.review_title: Great and not great for casual gamer
reviews.review_description: Love the immersion and the russian humour so was loving the game, but like many games keep getting stuck. First it was the next section didn't load. Luckily when I tried the game a second time it did trigger. But now I'm stuck because of radiation. Found the gas mask and a spare filter, reached behind to put it in backpack but when I'm about to die can't find it to replace the one that's worn out. And the in game instructions don't tell you controls in the submenus. In game it teaches you but I don't remember for instance how to turn on flashlight and gane controls menu doesn't tell you and I'm not playing from the beginning again just to have tutorial how to do all the controls
Aiming and movement in this game sucks so much. Also, story is so messy that its hard to understand.

reviews.review_title: Stuck in the tunnels for hours.
reviews.review_description: The tunnel thing ruined it for me. I've tried multiple times only to wander around the same tunnels for hours. I'm requesting a refund.

As a long time lover of this series (my absolute favorite series btw) this game was phenomenal in my personal opinion , to experience the world of metro in vr was absolutely astonishing. I enjoyed absolutely everything about this game , I do hope they intend on a dlc where Khan gets to interact with the Spartan Order , or heck any dlc and I do mean any and I will most definitely purchase it , tbh I feel like this game should have costed more do to how epic it is. Well on that note I'm going to close this review because I could literally talk about this series non-stop.

Kinda new to this whole VR thing as I bought my quest 3S in November, being a massive fan of the metro series from the console games I was itching to get my hands on this one. There is something absolutely amazing about seeing the metro world through your own eyes and experiencing it in this kinda platform from intense gun fights with realistic mag changes, feeling right in the horror when it gets more into the spooky sections, great character building and a real testament to the games that came before this, 100% recommend

reviews.review_title: Best VR game I have played
reviews.review_description:
The gun play and NPCs are amazing I was expecting the NPCs to be really bad but they made the gameplay so much better. 

Most of the negative reviews are just wrong They just lower the star rating for no reason.

I got this game 10 hours ago… I played the entire thing in one go. The game took me roughly around 8 hours and 54 minutes to complete. The videos are up on my channel currently.-“Ajax” And all I have to say…Is WOW. This game really blew me away. The creative story telling,The narrative. The big things to weapon mechanics, To little things like wiping condensation off of a FM54 Gas Mask. The fact that you can wipe the condensation off without have the Gas Mask on is pure Attention to detail.  This game’s got it all. If you want a Thrilling,Action,Narrated Story game. Play Metro Awakening VR now.
All-round good game
Could be better but it is what it is. It is worth giving it a try.
walking around getting yakked at, I thought being made by the same people who made Arizona sunshine I was safe, not so much. another game that will get uninstalled.

reviews.review_title: 10/10 GAME HOPE TO SEE MORE METRO GAMES
reviews.review_description:
I have this to say about it. it’s an amazing game with many different kinds of enemies. will miss it’s since i beat it 

hope to see more metro game in the future

This game really moved me and challenged my mind and emotions, it touched my soul in different parts of how I could relate to each character, this game moved me so much it actually brought me to tears.

This game was amazing i cant wait to see if you awesome developers create another masterpiece i cant wait to play more, I will definitely recommend this game to everyone.

In my opinion, this game can compete with Half-Life: Alyx!!! Easy gun loading, good graphics, nice atmosphere, not too complicated puzzles to make you mad. Wish the game was shorter and spend the giga bites in more detailed environment, cooler monsters, better headshots animations. I am still on chapter 3, but even if the game ends here, was worth the money...
Never played metro before but have to admit for now it is the game with the best graphics I've played so far. Fun game and really love the vide!

I absolutely love the metro series! And this game I feel captures the feel of the metro games to VR near perfectly! It is the VR so the environments themselves may not be as big but I blame the capabilities of the tech more than development itself. But if you love the metro games you will love this! And if you love immersion and a decent story but know nothing of the metro games and don’t mind a little bit of horror (make no mistake it can be VERY creepy at times) then I HIGHLY recommend this game

An incredible vr game there are problems its not perfect but i just love this game i've played through it 3 times and somehow my latest playthrough took me the longest i just can't help look around the environments and enjoy being IN the metro i highly recommend

BTW if your height is messed up at the turret sections try going the settings and switching from standing to seated and back again this fixed it for me

After just 20 minutes, I couldn’t stop. It was incredibly addictive. The immersion feels unbelievably real, and the graphics are absolutely stunning. The story is very engaging, and the gameplay mechanics are excellent. I truly believe this is a game that everyone should try at least once if you own a Meta Quest. You won’t regret it—trust me.
IN ALL MY TIME PLAYING VR GAMING AND THE ONLY GAME I HAVE LEFT A REVIEW. I HIGHLY RECOMMEND THIS GAME, PLAY IT NO MATTER WHAT PEOPLE ARE SAYING!!!!!!!!

Everything was awesome in this game. I played through all 12 chapters. No other VR game ever gave me this awesome feeling it is awesome. I got emotional and some parts. No other VR game actually made me care this much beautiful game. It was awesome. 👏👏👏

Well I gave it a try. I'm not a great gamer but I think anybody is going to need more than one bullet to get around in this world. Either I missed a butttload of ammo or they just don't give you any. It is also constantly dark everywhere.

reviews.review_title: A must buy for metro fans
reviews.review_description: At first I was bummed that we weren’t following artyom but they do a great job getting you interested in the story tho i would say the spawn for some mutants felt off sometimes it would be a ridiculous amount of enemy’s or just to little and the level transfers didn’t really match the vibe i was hope for some journal entries but there is none tho the khan does speak unlike artyom so that’s ok  but other than that the game is great
This game is just amazing every vr game should be like this also I have a problem with it because it too dark in there I miss loots a lot of times please make that lighting better

Good graphics with stable framerate, great voice acting / characters, and does the thing I like in survival horror of always having a buddy to chat with. Very linear progression with invisible walls, good tactical stealth moments and battles. 

Only clunky janky thing was fighting spiders. Can't grab / shoot / hit them off your face. These were frustrating deaths, not "I screwed up" deaths.

Finished in something like 20 hours moving slow. Lots of fun!! Seriously great game.
Honestly takes way too long to start with played it 3 times and been so bored i have turned it off, talk to this person, turn this valve over and over such a bore want my money back

reviews.review_title: Metro in VR feels very realistic
reviews.review_description: AAA goodness in VR. We need way more games like this. This is what VR was meant to be, not free to play slop. This game rivals any console or PC games I’ve played. I like the Metro series but being IN the game playing IN that world makes this the best one yet. From swapping out the filters to reloading guns by doing the actions not just button mashing truly makes this title special in VR over the other flat screen Metro titles.

reviews.review_title: Nothing happens, you just walk around
reviews.review_description:
95% of the first chapter is just walking around and listening to NPCs. There doesn't seem to be a way to skip that and actually play something, if that even exists in future chapters.

You also lose any progress if you quit before reaching a checkpoint, but it doesn't tell you when you do.

It made me nauseous from the artificial locomotion and just wasn't any fun. I loved Metro Exodus on the PC but this was really bad.

This game is incredible — a true blockbuster production. You really feel immersed in that post-apocalyptic atmosphere, with all the suspense, imagining that a monster could attack you at any moment, all while trying to survive the radioactive exposure and the lack of ammo for your weapon. Then suddenly you run into a group of rival survivors, a battle starts — and all of that happens in just the first two chapters I’ve played so far. I’m already hoping for a DLC with a new story, and I haven’t even finished this one yet. This game is a masterpiece; the only thing missing is a Brazilian Portuguese translation.
Had a blast with this game. Totally immersive in this post apocalyptic underground environment. The weapons are great.. The storyline powers you along as you engage with different baddies….
I love the story and the x box games

reviews.review_title: I love metro and in VR Amazing!
reviews.review_description:
I love metro, the whole series is just fantastic, the world of the game  is really well written and I played the games multiple times over just to feel the atmosphere that those game have, one of the best post apocalyptic series I ever played, so a metro game in vr seems interesting right? Yes especially if it is a prequel to one of the most interesting characters that we find in those games, the story is good and I do love the backstory for this character, I will not spoil anything but I do love the story.
The gameplay is similar to other metro games, of course in VR is a little different but I think they have done a pretty good job translating the game from flat to vr, the guns feels amazing I do love the interaction with them, the combat is fun and I do love the stealth section, sure I think that this game as too many on rail sections (ba dum tss) that after the second one are pretty annoying and yes the spider here are annoying, more annoying than in other games too but other than that the game is great, sure on quest 3 graphically is great with the whole metro atmosphere being there as well but it has some limitations especially with the draw distance.
Metro awekening is a good game, it has some problems but the atmosphere it's still there in the metro, so if you love the series you gonna like this game too.

I never comment or review on anything, but this game deserves a good rating. At first you barely know what’s going on, but the story drags you through. 
Very spooky moments, very easy to play. Puzzles are easy to figure out. EXCEPT THE MAZE! (Thank you creators for that) I almost lost it trying to figure it out TWICE haha. 
Loved the happy/sad ending. If the developers make another game I will definitely buy. 10/10
Good graphics/game play. The stories are a bit drawn out but I get it's the story line.

If you played and enjoyed Metro 2033 games you will love this game! I really thought it was cool how you can use the handcrank charger, gas mask, various weapons, and stealth knockout people. The story is also REALLY COOL! If you enjoyed that creepy level with Khan in the first Metro game then you will enjoy this game because you get to PLAY AS KHAN! He was a good character in the original game and it was cool to get to play a spin off of his origin story. I hope this review helps oh and some people said the ammo was scarce but I liled the survival aspect of it. I didn’t find the ammo to be that scarce. WHEN YOU KILL AN ENEMY TAKE OUT HIS MAGAZINE and store it to get some extra bullets. Good luck STALKER!
Best thriller Vr game on meta quest nothing compares.

I couldn’t get into the game and stopped playing it around halfway through. The combat just doesn’t feel good and isn’t enjoyable the way it is in other titles like Arizona Sunshine or similar games. I also found the story boring. I’m glad I bought it at a discount.
Impressed by the quality of gameplay, story and mechanics.

I've been playing metro for a while now and when I bought this it brought the series to life. It has great graphics, action, and storyline. The stealth in this game is amazing but there were a lot of jump scares witch was great. This is a great action game, I recommend this to people who love stealth and action.
Aimless wandering around in dark  shadows.

One of the best horror games IV played in a good while if u get scared easily by spiders or screaming don't play but if u love you gun over heating and you're light going out wile being jumped by a radioactive molerat thin this is the game for you you have to deal with your gun ammo and you're case mask filters but I beat th game with in a few days on the hardest difficulty the game has to offer I just wish there was more game or onithe game to continue it

reviews.review_title: The best game I’ve played needs a update
reviews.review_description: This game is very good I’m expecting to have an update soon and it would be interesting if you added rewards for beating the game on any difficulty, or adding game modifyers like from the last of us games.

Honest it was good I liked it got jumped scared many times had me sweating each break I had on metro the next metro game gotta hav a lot more enemies and sneaking around picking them off but honestly 9/10 good game
Mettete la lingua italiana

This game raises the bar for all other games. Do you have ANY IDEA how hard it is to go back to regular first-person shooters after this? The graphics are amazing, the story intriguing and the game play is brilliant. I've thoroughly enjoyed this game because of how  sucked in you become with the main character and the quest. There are tons of jump scares (especially if you leave arachnophobia mode) and really great weapons handling.
You can really take your time with the story or rush through with the subtly of a brick. Try both. It pays off either way.
I look forward to future games of this quality.
Thank you.

reviews.review_title: Half-Life & Resident Evil had a baby!
reviews.review_description: If you are looking for a story driven shooter, this is it. Absolute cinema!

reviews.review_title: Game that made me invest into VR
reviews.review_description:
Disclaimer: played via PCVR for increased graphical fidelity, but overall commentary is the same.

Given the selling point of VR gaming is often increased immersion, I can’t think of an IP better suited than Metro.

Traversing the tunnels, wearing the gas mask (which fits great given you’re physically wearing a headset already), grabbing your backpack to change weapons or charge the battery, exploring for ammo, it feels better than ever in VR.

The game does suffer from repetitiveness towards the second half when it comes to locations and there’s a missed opportunity in that we never go to the surface, which could have been an absolute highlight (hopeing for a sequel) but these elements do not detract from game's qualities.
I have restarted and re-download this game 5 times and the charger for the head lamp and cart hasn't shown up. Im getting tired of this crap

Aside from the glitch that made me visably shake for minutes at a time the story was cool and attention to detail was also noticeable but the metro envornment and mechanics get stale but overall worth the buy

I wasn't really sure what to expect as a newcomer to the series, but any expectations were exceeded!

The story was engaging and went in directions I didn't expect. The environments can get a tad repetitive, but there's a bit of a story reason for that. 

The guns were all satisfying, and I like that they went a more "arcadey" with reloads. Not every game has to have you insert bullets into the clip one-by-one, lol.

The enemies aren't too varied, but I found all encounters to be suspenseful without being too terrifying. Except for the spiders. Horrifying.

The music was also really good, and the voice actors did a superb job! 

I'd recommend this to anyone looking for a good, story-driven experience that doesn't mind a spooky atmosphere and a few tense moments.
Great game play and overall fun

reviews.review_title: LITERIAL best fking game ive ever played
reviews.review_description: get this game now. It is so good!
I’m haven’t even gotten to fire my own gun or explore and encounter enemies and what not. And already, based on the graphics, dialogue, and just overall beauty I’m loving the game.

Uh blah blah good game.
def recommend it.
trust im a vr expert 😼
Did not love the story, but enjoyed the combat, visuals, gameplay, and tools.  Pretty intense game, though.
